{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113394046CF0DA137FD3ED71E00"}"},"total":1330},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7582831508594754328","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"鱼塘你一定要一直写下去啊，这么好看的小甜文，不敢想象完结后没有了，我的戒断反应该多么难受，真的好好看啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765519122,"group_id":"7523507532908743705","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4032629770560547"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7523507532908743705","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"759"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读48小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":22809,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":171420,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7546842675262866238","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书里最让我感触深刻的是姚虞，她坚韧又温柔，同时还心存善良，对于贫苦百姓也有同情心，是我看过的清宫文中最最最最不同的角色。我还喜欢看仪欣对着王爷撒娇卖痴，有时也会威武霸气（比如打十四的时候[偷笑][偷笑][偷笑]），四爷就更不说啦，更是足智多谋掌控全局，走一步算十步，就是对我们仪欣也太“严厉”了，总是要“欺负”仪欣[奸笑][奸笑][奸笑][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757138919,"group_id":"7523507532908743705","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"追书中🤳","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2fF4qrrh6NoHukW+3OPbN6sPNQaIG90U1m6D4Vs14Vl","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ec95344d533544e889cd84efcc1f55a4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621685&x-signature=6PIyfz0D0zeqT1%2BTRP6Z4Dg5Lqs%3D","user_id":"4032629770560547","user_name":"发疯文学🌳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4032629770560547","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770886858,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7523507532908743705","book_info":{"abstract":"【娇憨笨蛋美人马齐嫡女富察仪欣+沉稳贵重白切黑雍亲王胤禛】
（粘人精、小太阳、生理性喜欢）
【双洁+独宠+年上+引导型爱人】
【避雷：私设如山，因为私设，好多历史都随之改变，把九子夺嫡年纪都减小六岁。】
【避雷：娇憨明媚成长型女主，想看女强的，可以再找一本喜欢的书，不要点进来再骂女主，谢谢谢谢】
富察仪欣是马齐的小女儿。
康熙四十七年，马齐和万岁爷在朝堂上大打出手，富察马齐打赢万岁爷获得了胜利！
进宫负荆请罪，以为得到的是全家流放宁古塔，谁知康熙将马齐幺女富察仪欣许配给雍亲王胤禛为嫡福晋。
搞什么？
雍亲王胤禛贵重沉稳，但是不近女色，府上连个侧福晋侍妾都没有，更不用提什么子嗣。
某日夜里。
富察仪欣带着哭腔委屈控诉：“他们明明说你不能人道。”
淡漠桃花眼里酿着情谊，男人闷闷低笑：“不是不能，是不想。”
富察仪欣：“那现在呢？”
胤禛：“嘶…小乖，别咬。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6c1b94c2d9896f48dbd3ef6de6a3b679","author":"孟毓唐","author_id":"","book_id":"7523507532908743705","book_name":"白切黑四爷每天都在欺负娇福晋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":88,"name":"嫡女","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=88&name=嫡女&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":460,"name":"独宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=460&name=独宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":853,"name":"白切黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=853&name=白切黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7523609690157105688","read_count":"50031","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"845171"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"401","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,嫡女,独宠,双洁,白切黑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/076ee4984ba30313e145086f1ecd427c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255580&x-signature=AMExrCTj3wJY54jhbGzdlm6stvc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"504049943977236","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"92"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113394046CF0DA137FD3ED71E00"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_du ation":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5496,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":20410},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7559280905895543576","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我因为作者大大的书感到幸福，就是那种很闷，心情很不好的时候，看到这本书会会心一笑，就是那种对爱情的憧憬。虽然我是一个很现实的人，然后对亲情的相视一笑。因为我在看这本书的时候，我也能通过其他人的视角知道。主角过得很幸福，就好像我会和他们相视一笑。希望作者现实生活中过得也很幸福。停下脚步缓一缓，也是可以的。是独宠。女主不会受任何委屈。男主很强大，是引导型的，看到这本书不会让你失望的。都很好，报仇也很爽快，不会拖拖拉拉的。就是那种心情不好，就算看过一遍了，再看一遍也会让人变得很开心，很温暖的小说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760036228,"group_id":"7523507532908743705","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3CuLQirkKkLCgMAHfvRbw1YwnNoWcKpRY48/iFSISwc","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1366013660364893","user_name":"西瓜大王小姐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1366013660364893","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7523507532908743705","book_info":{"abstract":"【娇憨笨蛋美人马齐嫡女富察仪欣+沉稳贵重白切黑雍亲王胤禛】
